heading: Expungement of profiles
label: 40743 Expungement of profiles
text: The expungement requirements under shall apply to any DNA profile or DNA data collected pursuant to this subchapter for purposes of inclusion in the National DNA Index System.section 12592(d) of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Katie Sepich Enhanced DNA Collection Act of 2012, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 2013 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 112–253126 Stat. 2407section 10101 of this titleJan. 10, 2013
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14137b of Title 42
